Re-Notice Of Mtn To Clarify Order Granting Discovery Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-26-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES WERE STATED.
HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant's motion to clarify the prior order is granted in part. Plaintiff is ordered to pay the following costs relating to the deposition of Dr. Thomas Teather: air fare, hotel, car rental, taxi cab fare, tolls, medical record retrieval, all video conferencing fees, and court reporting costs. The Court has reviewed the transcript of the proceedings of February 19, 2004 and notes that attorneys' fees were not ordered. Counsel for defendant shall submit proof of the following travel expenses: air fare, car rental, taxi cab fare, tolls, and medical records retrieval so the Court may modify the order to state a specific amount of costs. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
